Stop Touring. Start Traveling.
Platform Features

Everything heritage exploration needs

Built for the 40% of India without reliable internet, and every curious traveller beyond.

🗺️
Offline-First 2.5D Maps

Smart-cached vector maps deliver full navigation without signal. Heritage corridors load completely before you leave connectivity — no surprises in the field.

PWA · Service Workers
🔔
Geofence-Triggered Audio

90-second creator-led audio narratives activate automatically as you approach points of interest. Eyes-up, immersive, zero tapping required.

GPS · Geofencing
🎮
Gamified Quest System

Unlock District Passes, earn Yatra Credits, and complete scavenger hunts that reveal hidden vantage points. ₹49 per Quest unlock via UPI.

Gamification · UPI
🌐
22+ Language AI Narration

Real-time Indic translation powered by Bhashini and AI4Bharat. Every story told in the visitor's mother tongue — Tamil, Kannada, Hindi, and beyond.

Bhashini · AI4Bharat
🎙️
Voice Annotation Engine

Visitors contribute crowdsourced vernacular voice data validated by AnSI researchers — building a living language archive while exploring.

AnSI Validated
🔍
Cultural Graph Database

A proprietary knowledge graph linking language, history, and geography across every heritage site — the intelligence beneath every Naarad journey.

AWS · Graph DB
♿
WCAG 2.1 AA Accessible

Audio-first navigation for visually impaired users, screen-reader optimised, real-time Indic translation overlays, and high-contrast mode throughout.

WCAG 2.1 AA
👻
Ghost Director Programme

Become a creator. Record audio tours, earn Yatra Credits, and shape how future visitors experience your heritage site. Tourists become authors.

Creator Economy
🏛️
Institutional Data Pipeline

Formal MoUs with ASI and AnSI feed ethnographic and archaeological data directly into Naarad's content graph for verified, peer-reviewed accuracy.

ASI · AnSI
Technology Stack

Built for scale. Built for Bharat.

Enterprise-grade infrastructure powering heritage discovery at national scale.

☁️
AWS Serverless
API Gateway & Cognito for scalable, secure backend operations
🗣️
Bhashini / MeitY
Real-time Indic language translation across 22+ languages
📱
Progressive Web App
Service workers + smart caching for offline-first experience
🧠
AI4Bharat
Low-resource language AI training on vernacular voice data

News & Updates

What's new at Naarad

Sprint milestones, partnership news, and platform updates — straight from the team.

Sprint Update

NAARAD PWA Live on Google Play Store — Week 1 Sprint Complete

The NAARAD Progressive Web Application has been published on the Google Play Store, establishing our primary distribution channel. Initial user validation on the IIT Madras campus route has yielded positive testimonials, with users highlighting the geofence-triggered audio, hidden vantage points discovery, and heritage storytelling quality. The offline-first architecture leverages service workers and smart caching to deliver heritage navigation experiences in areas with poor connectivity — addressing the 40% of rural India without reliable internet.

📅 May 2026·👤 Aryan Mishra, Founder·⏱️ 4 min read
Partnership
Formal AnSI Collaboration Framework Established for Ethnographic Data Access
May 2026
Engineering
AWS Serverless Infrastructure Initiated — API Gateway & Cognito Setup
April 2026
Funding
FCDO £4,000 Grant Awarded — 3-Week Sprint Begins for Heritage Corridor MVP
April 2026
Legal
Company Registration Submitted via Government Portal — NAARAD Now a Legal Entity
March 2026
Sprint Changelog

Development milestones

May 2026
SHIPPED

PWA Live on Google Play Store

Progressive Web Application published. Offline-first architecture with service workers, 2.5D vector map engine, and geofence audio system deployed. IIT Madras pilot route validated.

May 2026
PARTNERSHIP

AnSI Formal Collaboration MoU

Anthropological Survey of India partnership formalised. Ethnographic data access agreed for Tamil Nadu and Karnataka pilot corridors. Peer review pipeline for vernacular content established.

Apr 2026
INFRA

AWS Serverless Stack Initiated

API Gateway and Cognito setup initiated. Offline-first 2.5D vector map engine under active development with smart caching layer for rural connectivity.

Apr 2026
LEGAL

Company Registration Submitted

NAARAD formalised as a legal entity through Government Portal. Enables formal MoUs with ASI, AnSI, State Tourism Boards, and UNDP. UPI payment infrastructure compliance unlocked.

Mar 2026
GRANT

FCDO £4,000 Grant Awarded

UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office grant of £4,000 awarded for 3-week MVP development sprint. Seed round of $15,000 also confirmed.

What's Inside

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

📶

100% Offline Capable

Download your corridor before you go. Works with zero signal — ideal for rural heritage sites with poor connectivity.

🔔

Automatic Audio Stories

Geofence triggers play 90-second creator audio as you walk. No tapping, no looking down — eyes-up exploration.

🌐

22+ Indian Languages

Powered by Bhashini. Every story available in your mother tongue — Tamil, Kannada, Hindi, Malayalam, and more.

🎮

Quest & Discovery System

Unlock hidden vantage points, earn Yatra Credits, and complete gamified cultural scavenger hunts from ₹49.

♿

Fully Accessible

WCAG 2.1 AA compliant. Audio-first navigation for visually impaired users with full screen-reader support.

🎙️

Become a Creator

Record your own heritage stories, earn Yatra Credits, and contribute to India's first living language archive.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Explorer
Free
forever
  • 1 free heritage route
  • Offline maps (basic)
  • Audio stories at POIs
  • Community access
Most Popular
District Pass
₹49
per heritage corridor
  • Full corridor access
  • All quest routes unlocked
  • Complete audio library
  • Hidden vantage points
  • Yatra Credits earned
  • 22+ language narration
Creator
Free
earn as you contribute
  • All Explorer features
  • Record audio annotations
  • Earn Yatra Credits
  • AnSI content validation
  • B2B data revenue share
